base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of boss_grim_reaper_float — a character (boss) from 1986 castlevania. Death / Grim Reaper — 2-frame robe-billow float. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Death / Grim Reaper — 2-frame robe-billow float; boss of Level 5 Cursed Prison. Teleports around screen while 4 scythes orbit and home-in on Simon. Notoriously difficult without Holy Water
